arts.sum: Fixtures Aston Villa U18 Vs. Tottenham Hotspur U18 - Sat, Sep 14th 2024, 12:00 A brace from Bradley Burrowes downed Tottenham Hotspur and saw Aston Villa move top of the Under-18 Premier League South. The flying winger picked out the bottom corner with a powerful drive to open the scoring after 17 minutes. And he inflicted further damage on Spurs with ten minutes to play when he raced clear of the defence and slotted his second of the afternoon. The victory takes Villa two points clear at the top after three wins from their opening four league matches. The game was only a couple of minutes old when Elijah Briscoe turned the ball into the net at the end of a flowing move, only for the striker to throw his arms up in frustration when he spotted the linesman flagging for offside. It wasn’t long before Jimmy Shan’s side did hit the front, netting the opening goal after 17 minutes. Cole Brannigan carried the ball across the pitch before finding Burrowes, who cut inside on his left foot and arrowed a shot into the far corner. There was little else to report from a tight first half, but Spurs lifted their game after the restart and fired efforts over via Ellis Lehane and Tynan Thompson. Sam Lewis made a strong save from Luca Williams-Barnett’s drive and George Feeney before Lehane curled an effort onto the post. The home side made their opponents pay for their missed chances when Burrowes doubled his tally with ten minutes remaining, skipping clear of the defence and sliding a shot past Samual Archer. Brannigan and Burrowes linked up again as Villa looked to pull further clear, with the latter rounding the ‘keeper and seeing his shot cleared by a covering defender. Upcoming Fixtures Chelsea U18 Vs. Aston Villa U18 - Sat, Oct 10th 2024, 11:00 Aston Villa U18 Vs. Crystal Palace U18 - Sat, Oct 10th 2024, 10:00 Middlesbrough U18 Vs. Aston Villa U18 - Sat, Nov 11th 2024, 11:00

arts.ttl: Aston Villa starting XI vs Young Boys predicted as Emery faces Watkins decision
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s Champions League adventure starts on Tuesday night as Young Boys host Unai Emery’s side at the Wankdorf Stadium (5:45pm kick-off). Both Barkley and Duran will be hopeful of starting against either Young Boys or Wolves next Saturday considering the amount of games Villa are playing before the October international break.

arts.ttl: Incredible fightback sends Villa Park wild
arts.sum: Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. Everton - Sat, Sep 14th 2024, 17:30 Aston Villa produced one of the most memorable Villa Park comebacks in recent memory on Saturday. Trailing 2-0 to Everton after 26 minutes, Ollie Watkins pulled one back before half-time. The striker levelled the scores after the break and fellow forward Jhon Durán belted in a long-range screamer to win the match with 14 minutes left to play. Here are the best pictures from the game...

arts.ttl: Troy Deeney makes 'poor' Ollie Watkins remark as he delivers Jhon Duran snub
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins got his season up and running during Saturday's 3-2 win over Everton, and Troy Deeney hopes the Englishman can kick on and rediscover his form from this point onwards. Watkins will now be aiming to get his first career Champions League goals against Young Boys this week.

arts.ttl: Jacob Ramsey gives injury update after a season of struggles
arts.sum: "Last season was tough with a lot of injuries, I’ve been back with the boys since pre-season, I’m feeling good," Ramsey said. The midfielder only started eight Premier League games due to injury after he fractured a metatarsal last summer while representing England at the European Under-21 Championships.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa follow Man City plan to combat unique Champions League problem
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola stated that it is "common sense" that grass is better for football in his pre-match press conference ahead of facing Young Boys, while City, like Villa, also chose to train at the Wankdorf Stadium instead of at their training campus in Manchester before the game. Aston Villa will train at the Wankdorf Stadium today to get used to the artificial surface they'll play on against Young Boys on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Jacob Ramsey makes Aston Villa pledge after Jhon Duran's stunning winner vs Everton
arts.sum: Jacob Ramsey's replacement Jhon Duran gave Aston Villa victory over Everton, but Ramsey has made a pledge of his own after a first home start since back in February

arts.ttl: What has changed about Jhon Duran after Aston Villa transfer uncertainty
arts.sum: Jacob Ramsey has praised Jhon Duran's shift in mentality, saying the striker returned to Aston Villa last month "a different player". I think this season as you can tell, he’s come back with a different mentality and attitude.

arts.ttl: European giants eye SHOCK move for Amadou Onana
arts.sum: The Spanish giants are also interested in signing PSV Eindhoven’s Jerdy Schouten and Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich as they look to bolster the midfield options available to Hansi Flick. Barcelona remain interested in Amadou Onana and could push to sign the Belgium international next year, despite his move to Aston Villa this summer.
